display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Doc
programme.desc: The search for Amy's hacker intensifies when the hospital finally brings in the FBI. S2 E11

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: The team works together after Nolan and Celina discover a possible suicide that spirals into conspiracy. S8 E15

programme.title: Firebite
programme.desc: Eleona faces off with the King and Tyson makes the ultimate sacrifice to free Shanika. S1 E7

programme.title: Notorious: The Cleveland Stranger
programme.desc: In 2009, police made a grisly discovery in a Cleveland neighbourhood. Eleven women were found murdered and decomposing inside the home of a psychopathic ex-Marine. Five women managed to escape.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: An elderly woman on her way to the club, unbeknownst to herself is driving on a suspended licence due to a medical review. Her feisty attitude proves to be a challenge for the officers.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions, and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature. Follow the friendship of these two prehistoric creatures.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Toi Time is back with a bang! Join Aunty Anika, Māia, Jojo, Tama, Buzz, and the new kid on the block, Riki. Get ready for laughter, learning, and lots of fun!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Join this merry band of Smurfs on their many magical adventures as they try to outsmart the wicked sorcerer Gargamel and his cat Azrael.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Sonic, Tails, Amy, Knuckles, and Sticks reside on Seaside Island in Hedgehog Village. Together they defend the island from various threats like Doctor Eggman and his robotic creations.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin, Cyborg, Starfire, Raven and Beast Boy are superheroes and roommates who love to save the day. But what happens when they're not fighting crime?

programme.title: Darwin And Newts
programme.desc: Darwin & Newts are a brother and sister duo who love adventures and figuring out how stuff works! Join them as they explore and discover new things, with the help of science and some Kiwi ingenuity.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Tākaro Tribe! They sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whānau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Tamaiti Satalo
programme.desc: Talofa! Sing and dance with A, E, I, O, and U as they explore their beautiful island home and learn Gagana Samoa (Samoan) with the help of their friends.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Farm to Fork takes you on a journey across Australia, showcasing fresh local produce to inspire healthy cooking. Discover where your food comes from, support local farmers, and learn how to eat well.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Harper avoids a hard truth. Alf and Roo work to heal. Tane supports Mackenzie.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp hosts a nail-biting quiz. Using knowledge, strategy and a little luck, contestants must cross the Bridge, spotting the lies. One wrong step and they lose everything!

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Travel Guides
programme.desc: Each week, five groups of bonza, ripper, fair dinkum Aussies become travel critics as they head on a week-long holiday. This week's destination - South Australia (go easy on yourselves, Aussies!).

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Springfield becomes the first city in the nation to hold a presidential primary, voters turn to the one person they can trust: Ralph Wiggum. S19 E10

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Leonard announces he's moving in with Penny, an emotional Sheldon decides to relive 2003 - a time where he had no emotions attached to anyone. S9 E4

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Mackenzie blames herself. Tane breaks some devastating news. David hands Richie a learning opportunity.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Chris gets cut down.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: Season Premiere: MasterChef Australia returns. 20 cooks have 90mins to cook their dream dish in order to win one of the 10 aprons on offer. S18 E1

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Nolan is put to the test when he's forced to protect a man he doesn't trust; Lucy and Celina follow a promising lead; Lopez finds herself conflicted about Wesley's new position. S8 E16

programme.title: The Hunting Party
programme.desc: The team pursues Dr. Sidney Fairfax, a twisted neuroscientist who mutilates the brains of his victims; as the case unfolds, Bex realizes the doctor may have not only the key to larger mysteries. S2 E7

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Season Premiere: James Acaster, Jessica Knappett, Kerry Godliman, Phil Wang and Rhod Gilbert line up to attempt Greg Davies' mostly meaningless challenges. S7 E1

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a seemingly fake photo of a dead call girl appears online, the CSIs follow up on a lead to find the woman was actually murdered. S11 E11

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Damages
programme.desc: Though sure that she's ready to help nail Frobisher, Katie sees that she's been used after the accuracy of her deposition is called into question. S1 E4

programme.title: Farmer Wants A Wife
programme.desc: Season Finale: Our very own Sam Armytage brings our five farmers together again in this very special reunion.

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: Series Premiere: A unique family of employees at a super-sized megastore hilariously tackle the day-to-day grind of rabid bargain hunters, riot-causing sales, and nap-worthy training sessions.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions, and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature. Follow the friendship of these two prehistoric creatures.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Toi Time is back with a bang! Join Aunty Anika, Māia, Jojo, Tama, Buzz, and the new kid on the block, Riki. Get ready for laughter, learning, and lots of fun!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Join this merry band of Smurfs on their many magical adventures as they try to outsmart the wicked sorcerer Gargamel and his cat Azrael.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Sonic, Tails, Amy, Knuckles, and Sticks reside on Seaside Island in Hedgehog Village. Together they defend the island from various threats like Doctor Eggman and his robotic creations.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin, Cyborg, Starfire, Raven and Beast Boy are superheroes and roommates who love to save the day. But what happens when they're not fighting crime?

programme.title: Darwin And Newts
programme.desc: Darwin & Newts are a brother and sister duo who love adventures and figuring out how stuff works! Join them as they explore and discover new things, with the help of science and some Kiwi ingenuity.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Tākaro Tribe! They sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whānau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Tamaiti Satalo
programme.desc: Talofa! Sing and dance with A, E, I, O, and U as they explore their beautiful island home and learn Gagana Samoa (Samoan) with the help of their friends.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: Season Premiere: MasterChef Australia returns. 20 cooks have 90mins to cook their dream dish in order to win one of the 10 aprons on offer. S18 E1

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Chris gets cut down.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Embarking on another waterway adventure, Timothy West and Prunella Scales follow the Oxford Canal through the Cherwell Valley, meeting son Samuel West and Philip Pullman.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales explore a picturesque stretch of the Canal du Midi in the south of France, visit the town of Beziers and taste lamb's brain fritters.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales head to Llangollen, Denbighshire, where they spent their honeymoon 50 years ago.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales visit the Burgundy region of France, where they travel along the Canal du Nivernais.

programme.title: Wild China
programme.desc: Exploring China's huge array of wonderful creatures. The heartland is home to the giant panda, the golden snub-nosed monkey and the golden takin.

programme.title: Wild China
programme.desc: Capturing China's dazzling array of creatures. The landscapes north of the Great Wall have shaped some of China's most colourful people and wildlife.

programme.title: Wild China
programme.desc: Exploring China's diverse wildlife. Ancient tea-growing cultures, bird-filled wetlands, white dolphins and futuristic cities jostle along the eastern seaboard.

programme.title: Wild Scandinavia
programme.desc: The Scandinavian coast is a place of haunting beauty and dangerous extremes, home to feisty puffins, orcas, eagles, otters and intrepid base jumpers.

programme.title: Wild China
programme.desc: Exploring China's huge array of wonderful creatures. The heartland is home to the giant panda, the golden snub-nosed monkey and the golden takin.

programme.title: Wild China
programme.desc: Capturing China's dazzling array of creatures. The landscapes north of the Great Wall have shaped some of China's most colourful people and wildlife.

programme.title: Wild China
programme.desc: Exploring China's diverse wildlife. Ancient tea-growing cultures, bird-filled wetlands, white dolphins and futuristic cities jostle along the eastern seaboard.

programme.title: Wild Scandinavia
programme.desc: The Scandinavian coast is a place of haunting beauty and dangerous extremes, home to feisty puffins, orcas, eagles, otters and intrepid base jumpers.

programme.title: Wild China
programme.desc: Exploring China's huge array of wonderful creatures. The heartland is home to the giant panda, the golden snub-nosed monkey and the golden takin.

programme.title: Wild China
programme.desc: Capturing China's dazzling array of creatures. The landscapes north of the Great Wall have shaped some of China's most colourful people and wildlife.

programme.title: Wild China
programme.desc: Exploring China's diverse wildlife. Ancient tea-growing cultures, bird-filled wetlands, white dolphins and futuristic cities jostle along the eastern seaboard.

programme.title: Wild Scandinavia
programme.desc: The Scandinavian coast is a place of haunting beauty and dangerous extremes, home to feisty puffins, orcas, eagles, otters and intrepid base jumpers.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales head to Llangollen, Denbighshire, where they spent their honeymoon 50 years ago.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales visit the Burgundy region of France, where they travel along the Canal du Nivernais.

programme.title: Sue Perkins: Along The Mexico Border
programme.desc: Sue Perkins visits the city of Tijuana, where she discovers an unexpected community of migrants - American retirees looking to enjoy the good life at an affordable price.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Aussie Road Train Truckers
programme.desc: Certified clean freak Brownie is covered in slop trying to load up hundreds of dirty cattle onto his road train, and Jake hits a deep crack in a dirt road.

programme.title: Aussie Road Train Truckers
programme.desc: It's the end of the dry season as Des delivers a record-breaking load to a secret multi-billion-dollar mine and Glen tackles the territory's most dangerous road.

programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under
programme.desc: The Ghan's maintenance team must race to ensure this iconic train departs the next day, and a routine job on a Queensland Rail commuter train hits a snag.

programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under
programme.desc: The construction of a 130-tonne locomotive in Newcastle is nearing the finish line, and an overnight crew must get a Brisbane train on track before the morning commute.

programme.title: Aussie Road Train Truckers
programme.desc: Certified clean freak Brownie is covered in slop trying to load up hundreds of dirty cattle onto his road train, and Jake hits a deep crack in a dirt road.

programme.title: Aussie Road Train Truckers
programme.desc: It's the end of the dry season as Des delivers a record-breaking load to a secret multi-billion-dollar mine and Glen tackles the territory's most dangerous road.

programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under
programme.desc: The Ghan's maintenance team must race to ensure this iconic train departs the next day, and a routine job on a Queensland Rail commuter train hits a snag.

programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under
programme.desc: The construction of a 130-tonne locomotive in Newcastle is nearing the finish line, and an overnight crew must get a Brisbane train on track before the morning commute.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: More vintage comedy with Messrs Barker and Corbett. Sketches include Chef's Special, Health, Humphrey and Godfrey, Rhyming Slang, Country Heaven, and Campers.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Classic comedy, monologues and music with Messrs Barker and Corbett. Sketches include Bank Manager, Double Identities, Sorry, Wrong Burglar, Pet Shop, and Bundle of Fun.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: More mirthsome moments courtesy of the two comedic masters, Ronnies Barker and Corbett. Here, the humorous highlights include Sunshine Boulevard and The Computer Doctor.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Classic sketches from the bespectacled legends Barker and Corbett, who, as Charley Farley and Piggy Malone are caught up in a diamond-smuggling racket on a cruise ship.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: More vintage comedy with Messrs Barker and Corbett. Sketches include Chef's Special, Health, Humphrey and Godfrey, Rhyming Slang, Country Heaven, and Campers.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Classic comedy, monologues and music with Messrs Barker and Corbett. Sketches include Bank Manager, Double Identities, Sorry, Wrong Burglar, Pet Shop, and Bundle of Fun.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: With the Anderton Boat Lift out of action, Robbie explores the scenic River Weaver onboard a borrowed narrowboat called 'Tench'.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie navigates the Oxford Canal, bumps into a hire boat and a hedge and tackles large river locks on the scenic Upper River Thames.

programme.title: Sacred Rivers with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve travels along the Yangtze in China, seeing ancient rock carvings and the biggest power station on the planet before arriving in Shanghai.

programme.title: Cornwall with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve travels through Cornwall as the county emerges from the first Covid-19 lockdown and discovers the impact of the disease on its tourist industry.

programme.title: Cornwall with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve investigates the environmental challenges facing Cornwall and the rest of the country and also encounters some of the county's iconic wildlife.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie returns to where his boating life began, exploring London's canals on Naughty Lass. He travels through Little Venice and moors in Paddington Basin.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: As Robbie leaves the scenic Llangollen Canal, he faces a journey of running repairs and narrowboat maintenance on the old Naughty Lass.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: With the Anderton Boat Lift out of action, Robbie explores the scenic River Weaver onboard a borrowed narrowboat called 'Tench'.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: As a teenager, all Dave wanted for his first car was a 2 litre Ghia Cortina, and today he's off to Nottinghamshire to collect just that, alongside a Mark 1 Capri.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul and daughter Kate collect a Series 1 Land Rover, while Jack collects an unusual wartime paratrooper's bike in Scarborough.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The guys are drawn by the curves of a stunning 1999 Morgan with an incredible 4.6 V8 engine, but things aren't as good as they seem when they get to the garage.

programme.title: I Am Ali
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the life of Muhammad Ali, featuring access to the heavyweight champion's personal archives, and interviews with family, friends and fellow boxers.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: The first episode of the classic sitcom about the unlucky but well-meaning Frank Spencer. His search for work leads him to become a wholesale ironmongery salesman.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: 1973 sitcom sequel, by the creators of Porridge and Auf Wiedersehen, Pet. Terry has a golden rule: 'Do unto others as they would do unto you, but do it first'.

programme.title: Villages By The Sea
programme.desc: Ben Robinson visits Northumberland's Craster to find out how a family who shares the name have had their lives and fortunes intertwined with the village for more than 800 years.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Mega Metro
programme.desc: After 30km of tunnelling, workers prepare to build stations, lay tracks and test driverless trains. At Central Station, the underground pedestrian subway comes to life.

programme.title: Mega Metro
programme.desc: After 10 years of planning, building and testing, involving more than 60,000 people from around the world, Australia's largest transport project nears completion.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Fiat X1/9 / Austin A60 Cambridge: There's real Yorkshire drama when Derek sells vehicles from TV show Heartbeat, love for an Austin Cambridge, and a sporty Italian number getting rehomed.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A rare Honda S800 sports car from 1967 takes Derek's fancy, and a couple of very different Ford Capris with long histories go head-to-head at the auction.

programme.title: Churchill's Toy Shop
programme.desc: Documentary examining how Winston Churchill brought together a group of scientists and engineers to come up with ingenious secret weapons during the Second World War.

programme.title: The Battle of Britain
programme.desc: An in-depth look at one of the most pivotal battles of the war - when Britain defended its skies against German invasion.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team of valuers welcome visitors to the Assembly Rooms, Bath.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents from Blists Hill Victorian Town near Ironbridge in Shropshire, where items include a set of early puppets.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek navigates the dry stone walls of the Peak District to collect a very original 1988 Opel Manta. Plus, Dave deals with a Ford Granada rally support vehicle.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek has a three-hour drive in a 1960s bus that arrived in the UK after a life in the sun. Dave takes a Triumph TR7 convertible to auction.

programme.title: Churchill's Toy Shop
programme.desc: Documentary examining how Winston Churchill brought together a group of scientists and engineers to come up with ingenious secret weapons during the Second World War.

programme.title: The Battle of Britain
programme.desc: An in-depth look at one of the most pivotal battles of the war - when Britain defended its skies against German invasion.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team of valuers welcome visitors to the Assembly Rooms, Bath.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie sets off from Runcorn on the Bridgewater Canal, but a series of unfortunate mishaps soon tests his patience - from lost camera footage to closed canals.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie slips and falls overboard on Heartbreak Hill. Also, Eddie 'the Stove Man' and his enormous German Shepherd fix the fireplace on the old Naughty Lass.

programme.title: Operation Gold Rush
programme.desc: Dan Snow and a team of adventurers follow the 19th-century Klondike gold rush route. Here, Dan and his team take on the Alaskan Coastal Mountains.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek navigates the dry stone walls of the Peak District to collect a very original 1988 Opel Manta. Plus, Dave deals with a Ford Granada rally support vehicle.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek has a three-hour drive in a 1960s bus that arrived in the UK after a life in the sun. Dave takes a Triumph TR7 convertible to auction.

programme.title: Inspector George Gently
programme.desc: Martin Shaw in the fifth series of the superb mystery set in 1960s Northumberland. Gently probes the death of a girl in a car owned by local aristocrats.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric. Father Brown is trapped in a derelict building when a former music hall comedian swears revenge.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric. Flambeau enlists Father Brown's help to steal the pope's coronation gift to the Queen of England.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric. Lady Felicia's reckless driving lands her in a hospital bed next to Mrs McCarthy with a killer on the loose.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric. Father Brown deduces that the apparent suicide of a recently returned RAF pilot was actually murder.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: Frank and Lu investigate a case of paranormal activity when they are approached by a wealthy member of the local trainspotting community.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: An idyllic Shakespeare walk soon turns to disaster when one of the walkers is murdered and Frank becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Jack is on the case when a zoo owner is killed by a tranquilliser dart in an empty park - with the only possible culprits in the staff area when the shot was fired.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The investigation into a brutal murder in a public toilet has Murdoch butting heads with Inspector Choi as he closes in on the killer.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Rex sniffs out the secrets behind a groundbreaking gin recipe and the heirs to a distillery after the patriarch is drowned in his own spirits.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A TV presenter takes a midnight swim, only for her body to be washed up on the shore - and while evidence points towards an accidental drowning, Jack is not so sure.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric from the mind of GK Chesterton. Brown is put in an impossible situation when told that Bishop Talbot will be assassinated.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: Frank and Lu investigate a case of paranormal activity when they are approached by a wealthy member of the local trainspotting community.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: An idyllic Shakespeare walk soon turns to disaster when one of the walkers is murdered and Frank becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch and Ogden's weekend at a country inn goes awry when a guest is murdered.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: In the shadow of the Virtue Ministry, two controversial courtships continue. Watts is unnerved by the public's reaction to his liaison with Jack.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Trapped in elaborate puzzle rooms within an abandoned factory, Murdoch, Ogden, Crabtree and Brackenreid must escape or face horrific deaths.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch investigates when a string of vicious animal attacks in High Park terrorise the residents of Toronto.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Brackenreid and some fellow inspectors unwind in a remote lodge, but their respite turns deadly when they find themselves hunted by a killer.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: When Lady Felicia's home comes under threat, Father Brown is forced to seek help from an unlikely ally.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Teresa and Rigsby examine the murder of a film-maker who was shot at close range, and Patrick is taken hostage by the prime suspect while paying a parking fine at City Hall.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex witness an armed robbery during a trip to the bank, and soon discover a connection to a string of ingenious unsolved heists.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Carrie's personal and professional lives collide when her boyfriend's best friend becomes the prime suspect in a double homicide.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The Secret of the Flame Tree: Caribbean twists with Kris Marshall. Florence finds herself emotionally involved in a case when a former schoolmate is found dead at the foot of a cliff.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch investigates when a string of vicious animal attacks in High Park terrorise the residents of Toronto.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Brackenreid and some fellow inspectors unwind in a remote lodge, but their respite turns deadly when they find themselves hunted by a killer.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Teresa and Rigsby examine the murder of a film-maker who was shot at close range, and Patrick is taken hostage by the prime suspect while paying a parking fine at City Hall.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex witness an armed robbery during a trip to the bank, and soon discover a connection to a string of ingenious unsolved heists.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: When Lady Felicia's home comes under threat, Father Brown is forced to seek help from an unlikely ally.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Carrie's personal and professional lives collide when her boyfriend's best friend becomes the prime suspect in a double homicide.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The Secret of the Flame Tree: Caribbean twists with Kris Marshall. Florence finds herself emotionally involved in a case when a former schoolmate is found dead at the foot of a cliff.

programme.title: Return to Paradise
programme.desc: I.P. Tide: Brilliant DI Mackenzie Clarke leaves London and returns to her hometown of Dolphin Cove in Australia, just in time for a local man to wash ashore with a knife in his back.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric from the mind of GK Chesterton. A fugitive takes sanctuary in St Mary's and asks Father Brown for help.

programme.title: Coldwater
programme.desc: John struggles to cope with his guilt, but a bizarre hunting trip changes his perspective; Tommy's influence on him grows. S1 E2

programme.title: Q+A With Jack Tame
programme.desc: Hosted by Jack Tame, Q+A brings viewers the important political interviews and discussions of the week, taking a close look at politics, economics, and global events.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: The Royal Variety Performance 2024
programme.desc: Alan Carr and Amanda Holden team up to host The Royal Variety Performance, from London's Royal Albert Hall in the presence of Their Majesties The King and Queen.

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: The more you know, the further you go. Knowledge equals speed as contestants battle it out to reach the finish line first. Action-packed quiz fun with Roman Kemp and Sarah Greene.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Help! We Bought A Village
programme.desc: Intrepid Brits restore empty and unloved settlements heading steadily for collapse, as they breathe new life into remote villages, hamlets, borgos and cortijos abroad.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: Find My Country House: New Zealand
programme.desc: Marcella and Jesse are searching for a country property that can be both a family home and a wedding venue. From a 10-acre renovated lot to a large family home, and finally a Tudor-style gem.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it Deal or No Deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Celebrity Tipping Point NZ
programme.desc: Series Premiere: Three New Zealand Celebrities take on the mighty Tipping Point machine to try and win the $10,000 jackpot for their chosen charity.

programme.title: Amanda & Alan's Greek Job
programme.desc: Season Finale: There’s no holding back with the last space as Amanda and Alan go all out designing an outdoor kitchen before revealing the transformation of the entire house with a farewell party.

programme.title: The Secret Genius Of Modern Life
programme.desc: Hannah uncovers the wild origins of the modern-day rollercoaster and gets the inside story on the UK’s newest, tallest and fastest coaster – Thorpe Park's Hyperia.

programme.title: Would I Lie To You?
programme.desc: Rob, David and Lee are joined by Adrian Chiles, Seann Walsh, Aisling Bea and June Brown.

programme.title: Tip Toe
programme.desc: Series Premiere: Leo and Clive have been neighbours for 14 years, but when a one-night stand goes wrong, a feud begins which quickly escalates into danger. S1 E1

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Chris gets cut down.

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: A collapse shocks Olivia and Sally as their patient appears to be having a heart attack. Carlos and Nhi fear for their safety as a volatile woman lashes out in the ambulance.

programme.title: Endangered Species Aotearoa with WWF
programme.desc: Pax and Nicola find themselves in a remote and rugged location known as the Chatham Islands, in search of the most elusive and exceptional bird in Aotearoa. S1 E5

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: A manager takes a job on a farm newly bought by an Austrian business couple who know little about farming, but bring a new approach to how the farm is run.

programme.title: BNZ Business Breakfast
programme.desc: Join BNZ Business Breakfast for a sharp, authoritative start to the business day. In just 30 minutes we set the agenda — fast, focused, and forward-looking.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: The more you know, the further you go. Knowledge equals speed as contestants battle it out to reach the finish line first. Action-packed quiz fun with Roman Kemp and Sarah Greene.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.
